name: Appointment on February 30th
description: Patient requests an appointment on a non-existent date.
goal: Try to book an appointment for February 30th; accept correction to a valid date.
behavior: Start with a polite and confident tone
If corrected, ask for an explanation and accept a valid February date
success_criteria: Agent must not confirm an appointment for February 30th
Agent should explain the error of the date
Agent should offer a valid date in February as an alternative
orchestrator_hint: Patient requests an appointment on February 30th, which doesn't exist.
